Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add MVP retention & conversion features

Collections, brand requests, click tracking, usage counters,
weekly email cron, upgrade popup, greyed filters, and 14-day
Pro trial support.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add plan selection screen, fix pricing & improve weekly email

- Subscribe page now lets users choose between Basic \(4,900\) and Pro \(9,900\)
- Pricing page updated with 4 tiers: Free, Basic, Pro, Agency
- Payment API accepts plan parameter and sets correct amount
- Webhook sets the correct plan name from payment metadata
- Weekly email template redesigned with stats, industries, countries
- Cron schedule changed to 8 AM Monday
- Resend API key added to Vercel

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Remove 14-day free trial feature entirely

- New users start on Free plan \(no more auto Pro trial\)
- Remove trial detection from dashboard, navbar, profile, track-click,
  favorites, brand-requests
- Remove trial expiration cron logic from check-subscriptions
- Update marketing pages: pricing, hero, navbar, register, paywall
- Replace trial CTAs with direct plan selection links
- Fix pricing references \(4,900 / 9,900 XOF instead of 25,000\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
